parent.label: Academic Papers
parent.description: Scholarly writing from peer-reviewed journals and preprint servers. Academic papers have a distinctive structure — abstract, methods, results, discussion, references — that teaches precise argumentation and hedged claims ('we hypothesize,' 'the data suggest'). The corpus includes everything from computer science to biomedicine to economics.
bullets: PubMed Central: 7M+ open-access biomedical full texts
Citation networks teach models the relationship between claims and evidence

cells.label: AI/CS Papers
cells.description: Computer science and AI preprints — including, recursively, papers about language models trained on data that includes papers about language models. The GPT-4 technical report is in the training data for models trained after it. This creates peculiar epistemic loops.
bullets: GPT-4 Technical Report (2023): trained-on and training-source simultaneously
Attention Is All You Need (2017): cited 100,000+ times, appears in countless forms in training data
Models trained on descriptions of their own architecture — a strange mirror
cells.screenshotCaption: GPT-4 Technical Report on arXiv — a paper that became part of the training data for later models

cells.label: Biomedical / PubMed
cells.description: Open-access biomedical literature from PubMed Central — clinical trials, systematic reviews, case studies, molecular biology. Teaches models the grammar of scientific evidence: p-values, confidence intervals, study design, and careful causal hedging.
bullets: PubMed Central Open Access: 4M+ full-text biomedical papers freely available
Rich in structured data: dosages, diagnoses, genetic markers, outcome measures
Medical language includes Latin, Greek roots, and highly specialized abbreviations

cells.label: Other Disciplines
cells.description: Social sciences, humanities, economics, physics, and everything else that makes it into open-access repositories. Diverse disciplinary vocabularies and writing conventions.
bullets: JSTOR Open Access: thousands of humanities and social science papers
SSRN: economics and legal studies preprints
Each discipline brings its own conventions for evidence and argument
